name: Harry Potter
description: The Boy Who Lived, Hogwarts, and the wizarding world

questions.q: What is the name of Hagrid's baby Norwegian Ridgeback dragon?

source.notes: Later revealed to be female and renamed 'Norberta.'

questions.q: Which Death Eater kills Dobby the house-elf in 'The Deathly Hallows'?

source.notes: She throws a silver dagger during the escape from Malfoy Manor.

questions.q: Which actor plays Ron Weasley in the Harry Potter film series?

source.notes: Played Ron in all 8 films (2001-2011). Was 11 at casting.

questions.q: What type of animal is Mrs. Norris, Argus Filch's companion at Hogwarts?

source.notes: Named after a character in Jane Austen's Mansfield Park.

questions.q: Which comedic actor played the ghost Sir Nicholas de Mimsy-Porpington (Nearly Headless Nick)?

source.notes: Only appeared in Sorcerer's Stone and Chamber of Secrets.

questions.q: What is the last name of the Daily Prophet reporter Rita, known for her gossip columns?

source.notes: Unregistered animagus who transforms into a beetle.

questions.q: What is the name of Harry Potter's snowy owl?

source.notes: Gift from Hagrid. Killed in 'The Deathly Hallows.'

questions.q: What is Hagrid's magical heritage?

source.notes: Mother was giantess Fridwulfa. His half-brother Grawp is a full giant.

questions.q: Into what creature does Professor Lupin transform during a full moon?

source.notes: Bitten by Fenrir Greyback as a child.

questions.q: What is the maiden name of Harry Potter's mother Lily?

source.notes: Her sister Petunia married Vernon Dursley.

questions.q: Which actor played the stuttering Professor Quirinus Quirrell in 'Sorcerer's Stone'?

source.notes: Voldemort was on the back of Quirrell's head under the turban.

questions.q: Which actor, who later became a 'Twilight' star, played Cedric Diggory in 'The Goblet of Fire'?

source.notes: Cedric is killed by Peter Pettigrew in the graveyard scene.

questions.q: Which composer wrote the iconic 'Hedwig's Theme' for the Harry Potter film series?

source.notes: Scored the first three films. The theme is used throughout the series.

questions.q: How many players are on each Quidditch team?

source.notes: 1 Keeper, 3 Chasers, 2 Beaters, 1 Seeker.

questions.q: How many points is catching the Golden Snitch worth in Quidditch?

source.notes: Ends the match. Regular goals (through hoops) are worth 10 points.

questions.q: Which unforgivable curse causes instant death in the wizarding world?

source.notes: The killing curse. Produces a green light. The other two unforgivables are Crucio and Imperio.

questions.q: What magical object allows Hermione to attend multiple classes simultaneously in her third year?

source.notes: Loaned to her by Professor McGonagall.

questions.q: What was the first spell Harry taught to Dumbledore's Army?

source.notes: The disarming charm. Harry's signature spell.

questions.q: What symbol do Death Eaters have tattooed on their left forearms?

source.notes: A skull with a snake coming from its mouth. Glows when Voldemort calls them.

questions.q: In what year was the first Harry Potter film, 'The Sorcerer's Stone,' released?

source.notes: November 2001. Titled 'The Philosopher's Stone' outside the US.

questions.q: Where does Hagrid conceal his (officially broken) wand?

source.notes: His wand was snapped when he was expelled from Hogwarts.

questions.q: How many Deathly Hallows are there, which together would make the owner the 'Master of Death'?

source.notes: The Elder Wand, the Resurrection Stone, the Cloak of Invisibility.
